query: muddy low contrast gray oppressive heavy fog smog suffocating bleak atmosphere
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: low-contrast oppressive — fog, smog, monotone gray, weak tonal separation, suffocating bleakness

response.objective_caption: A nighttime scene of a snow-covered road extending toward distant streetlights. Snow-laden evergreen trees line the left side of the road, and snowbanks border the pavement. Tire tracks mark the road surface. Fog obscures the surroundings and merges the sky with the snowy landscape, with bright lights visible in the distance.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A nighttime scene of a snow-covered road extending toward distant streetlights, framed by snow-laden evergreen trees on the left. The image displays muted, faded near-monochrome tones with extremely low vibrancy. Weak separation between light and dark produces a low-contrast, oppressive atmosphere across the frame. The desolate, fog-shrouded winter setting evokes atmospheric distress and unease.
